form.formComment: Second-up. First start eased back early on 6th of 10 at Warren Mdn-Sw on June 2 over 1000m, 4 len behind Houdini Spirit with 56.5kg at $6.50. Went for a spell before returning rolled along in front before being edged out 2nd of 9 at Goulburn Ctry Mdn on March 22 over 1100m, on a slow track; 4 len behind Brutal Belle with 58kg at $3.40. Shaping up nicely and is among the chances.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell. Not seen since he finished last of 12 at Albury Mdn-Sw November 24 over 1400m, 23 len behind Albanian Beauty carrying 57.5kg at $3.50. On debut fourth of 9 at Albury Mdn-Sw October 25 over 900m, 1.4 len behind Bargino carrying 56.5kg at $2.50. Capable of making a bright return.

form.formComment: First starter. Three-year-old filly by Harry Angel out of Beautify. At the most recent trial finished fifth at Wagga over 1000m. Prefer to see.

form.formComment: First starter. Three-year-old filly by Snitzel out of The Hamptons purchased for AUD $ 190,000 (Magic Millions 2024 Gold Coast Horses In Training Sale). At the most recent trial was out of the placings over 1030m at Rosehill February 12. Not likely to make an impression.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Third race start today. When well in the market at debut, tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 10 at Towong Mdn-Sw on March 7 over 1200m, on a slow track; 1.0 len behind Hidden Bay with 57kg at $3.80. Last start ran last of 9 at Yarra Valley Mdn-Sw on March 24 over 1200m, on a slow track; 5 len behind Benriach with 57kg at $10. Possible improver.

form.formComment: Was well in the market at debut, 6th of 14 at Wagga Mdn on March 29 over 1200m, slow going 5 len behind Kenny's Swans with 56.5kg at $5. Should offer a lot more resistance this time.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Last start 5th of 8 at Orange Mdn-Sw on March 22 over 1000m, slow going 2.25 len behind The Biv with 56.5kg at $5.50. Before that tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 6th of 9 at Canberra Mdn on February 20 over 1300m, 4 len behind Silver Touch with 56.5kg at $8.50. Lightly raced filly who is nicely placed to open her account.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: After being slow to begin, ridden along to obtain a forward position.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after a year sat on speed throughout when 2nd of 11 at Sapphire Coast Ctry Mdn-Sw on March 30 over 1000m, slow going 1.0 len behind Inchyra with 56.5kg at $31. Previously second-up second last of 8 at Queanbeyan Mdn on April 22 over 1200m, slow going 16 len behind Tommy Flyer with 56kg at $91. Among the chances based on that latest performance.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. At the latest run held ground to the line 2nd of 14 at Wagga Mdn-Sw on March 29 over 1000m, slow going 1.1 len behind Minks Written carrying 56.5kg at $4.40. Before that sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 8 at Moe 3yo Mdn-Sw on February 22 over 1200m, 2.5 len behind Hook 'N' Spur carrying 56kg at $6. Fitter for that latest run and is well placed to go one better.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly in the lead. Passing the 100m, shifted ground marginally.
Shortly after the start, bumped and hampered by Smart And Mighty.
Began awkwardly. Raced wide without cover.

form.formComment: At the latest run 4th of 12 at Tocumwal Mdn-Sw on April 4 over 1100m, 2 len behind Zar Zar with 56.5kg at $5.50. The race before that got back early 5th of 10 at Albury Ctry Mdn-Sw on March 19 over 1000m, slow going 5.5 len behind Flower Fairy carrying 56.5kg at $61. Requires sharp improvement.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Passing the 100m carried wider by Stern Reminder.
Raced three wide and without cover throughout the event.
Raced wide and without cover throughout the event.

form.formComment: Most recently 2nd in a small field at Tullibigeal Pic Mdn-Sw on March 28 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind Elisa with 64.5kg at $2. The start before that 3rd in a small field at Ardlethan Pic Mdn-Sw on March 21 over 1200m, long-neck behind Second Guess carrying 64.5kg at $23. Will need massive improvement to trouble these.

form.formComment: At the latest run 12th of 14 at Wagga Mdn-Sw on March 29 over 1000m, on a slow track; 6 len behind Minks Written carrying 56.5kg at $41.
